title: 我的世界王国之泪
description: This mod restores some structures, items, and creatures from Tears of the Kingdom, waiting for you to explore.
body:
Minecraft in Tears of the Kingdom
This mod brings the lost sky realm from "Tears of the Kingdom" into the block world. Your adventure will begin on sky islands floating among the clouds, scattered with mysterious emblems, where you can explore serene and ancient ruins; and in the vast underground beneath the main world, shrouded in darkness and miasma.  

However, this sky is not defenseless. Ancient automated guardians—the Soldier Golems—will be activated within the ruins, serving as powerful new hostile creatures challenging trespassers. Defeating them gives you a chance to obtain classic items imbued with power, like Zonau Energy.  

At the same time, you can also seek and acquire iconic equipment such as the Hylian Shield and Master Sword in the world, making your adventure even more legendary. This mod aims to recreate the unique landscape and tense encounters of the floating continent, inviting you to embark on a journey among the clouds.。
